narrative:
Kenton City has 4,379 registered voters, with 62.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
